name: Shubham Kumar
my_twin: If I had a personal digital twin, it would track every decision I make under uncertainty — because I'm building Symbiote-X, a neuro-symbolic AI governance architecture for drones and autonomous systems where AI that hallucinates its way into bad decisions can cost lives, and I want to know whether the guardrails I'm designing for machines actually hold for the human running them. It would also map how I move between abstraction layers — from a Neo4j graph schema to a Streamlit dashboard to a pitch deck — because that context-switching is where most of my errors hide.
